prestazioni: Engine swap to a 3B 2.2L turbocharged inline-5 (engine code: 3B) with a custom forged internals build featuring Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a fully balanced crankshaft by JE Pistons. Pair with a Garrett GT35R turbo (62mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by Milltek Sport, mated to a 3-inch cat-back exhaust system with dual 100mm outlets by Supersprint.

Full standalone engine management conversion using a Motec M150 ECU with custom wiring harness by Syvecs, integrated with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158003 1200cc/min high-flow fuel pump, dual 1000cc/min ID1000 injectors by Injector Dynamics, and a custom top-mount intercooler (TMIC) by Wagner Tuning with a 60mm core thickness and 100% aluminum construction for the 3B’s unique packaging constraints.

Chassis reinforcement via a full seam-welded front subframe and rear torque arm mounts by 034 Motorsport, paired with a Quaife ATB differential (part # QDF7Z) in the rear and a custom 4.11:1 ring & pinion gear set by The Driveshaft Shop. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part # DFV02-02-01) featuring 8-position rebound damping and 20-way compression adjustment, combined with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (25mm front, 30mm rear) to correct scrub radius.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the rare and discontinued Kamei RS2-style fender flares (originally designed for the Audi 90 Quattro) adapted for the Cabriolet’s chassis, paired with a custom carbon fiber hardtop by Prior Design (model: PD-GTC80) with integrated rear spoiler and LED brake light bar.

Custom 18x9.5 ET25 front and 18x10.5 ET20 rear wheels by BBS RS-GT (color: Anthracite, center-lock conversion) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Brake system upgrade to Alcon 6-piston front calipers (part # 400.08.00) with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Alcon 4-piston rear calipers (part # 400.04.00) and 330mm rotors.

Full interior retrim in black Nappa leather with red contrast stitching by Recaro (using the Pole Position seat frames, part # 385.00.000) and a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (bolt-in, 6-point design with integrated harness bars for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses). Steering wheel replacement with a Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) and a custom gauge pod by Defi (featuring oil pressure, oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR gauges in a carbon fiber enclosure).
